title: Best Saturation Pack
description: This TexturePack reinterprets the way we see the game and adds more vibrant and eye-catching colors, improving your viewing experience.
body:
Transform the visual experience of the environment by granting greater saturation, while still maintaining the base style and perspective. Saturation is carefully increased in-game, preserving a balance between vibrancy and vanilla. This pack was developed with the goal of visually enhancing the atmosphere and improving, at least a little, the experience without exaggerated changes, in order to maintain vanilla gameplay. ### 🎨 Features: - More vibrant and lively colors. - Support for vanilla: mobs, blocks and items. - Vanilla standard (16x) lightweight, ideal for low‑spec PCs. - For players who enjoy using features like Optifine or Continuity: certain versions include compatibility with connected glass through the ConnectedBlocks function. --- ### ⛏ Utility: This pack works perfectly in both single-player worlds and vanilla servers. It doesn’t alter gameplay directly, so it won’t add or remove anything that changes your vanilla experience — only visual improvements. If you’d like to keep the vanilla essence but make it a little more vibrant and colorful, this might be the one to try! ### 🌈 What Makes It Special? We don’t claim this is one of the industry’s top packs, nor that it will be everyone’s favorite. What we do promise is to stay true to the essence it set out to deliver from the very beginning. --- ## 🎬 See It in Action
💎 Capture by versions
The Tiny Takeover [26.1]
The Tricky Trials [1.21]
 The Bundles of Bravery [1.21.2]

--- **✨ Compatible with Minecraft Java:** - 26.1.x [Latest] - 1.21.x - 1.16.x - 1.8.x - 1.0.x [📥 Download it now and rediscover Minecraft in a more colorful, vibrant way!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/best-saturation-pack/versions) ---
